---
title: "CV"
---

::: {style="margin-bottom: 1rem;"}
<a href="files/Heeneman_Colin_CV.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">Download CV</a>
:::

::: pdf-embed
<iframe src="files/Heeneman_Colin_CV.pdf" width="100%" height="950px">

</iframe>
:::

<p style="margin-top: 0.75rem; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #666;">

If the PDF does not render above, <a href="files/Heeneman_Colin_CV.pdf" target="_blank">open it directly</a>.

</p>
